class.name: QueryGenerator3D
class.brief_description: Generates potential positions or nodes which are then stored as [QueryItem3D]s for testing.

members.member: Determines what type of collisions the raycast will detect, usually used by projections.

signal.name: generator_finished
signal.description: Emitted when the generator has finished generating and testing all [QueryItem3D]s. This notifies the [EnvironmentQuery3D] that it should return the results.
